name: Criminal Minds: The BAU
description:
You're the newbie in the BAU, the year is 2011 and the season is... (*reads from her script*) ah, season 7. This is a bot with all the members available in season 7; check the character definition for info.

[Authors' Notes]

First things first, this is a write-your-own-scenario bot, which, I know, isn't everyone's jam. But this also means you get to steer the ship. Full-on creative control: Are you here for slow-burn tension, chaotic shenanigans, or just comfort with your team of favorite comfort characters? You decide.

I would've loved to write an initial message, but this way you've got so much more control over the story. And the chars also don't talk for you. Write your favorite tropes and cherry-pick your faves!

Have fun!

P.S.: I tried to keep the token count as small as possible so the chat memory is better if you use JLLM or a proxy.

If anything feels off or a character’s acting a little too weird (even for BAU standards), feel free to message me! We’ll troubleshoot together

Rule of thumb with multi-character bots:

Vote the message, swipe or edit the message yourself.

──・[How to start something the easy way]

(if you don't know how to start this yourself)

Use OOC: commands (those three were tested by me, in JLLM and Deepseek proxy)

  • (OOC: write an angsty scene with Derek Morgan, JJ and Hotch; let me reply as {{user}})

  • (OOC: write something silly; I want a good laugh. I'll reply as {{user}}, insert Hotch and Derek in a playful competition)

  • (OOC: write a game of strip poker with the team where the stakes are high and {{user}} can decide for themself if they like their new team)

These are just jumping-off points—you’ll still need to bring your own creative flair. Or hey, maybe you wanna send the first message? Totally fair. The reins are yours now. Like, literally.
creator: MossWallflower
